title: Khy's Rotten Tools
description:
Adds early custom copper gear! These items are not yet in vanilla Minecraft — this pack gives you a visual preview of potential future copper tools.

Khy's Tools Reborn gives Minecraft tools a twisted vibrancy — bright, bold, yet eerily off.
body:
🛠️ Complete Toolset Overhaul – Custom Retextures for All Tools!

🎨 This resource pack reimagines every tool type in Minecraft with hand-crafted pixel art, bringing a fresh and cohesive look to your survival adventures.
From rustic stone tools to the mighty netherite, each item has been redesigned from scratch to maintain Minecraft’s original charm while adding unique character to each material.
✅ What’s Included:

🔸 Stone Tools – Rough and rugged, with chipped edges and raw shapes
🔸 Gold Tools – Polished and ceremonial, but fragile-looking
🔸 Iron Tools – Industrial and sturdy with reinforced textures
🔸 Diamond Tools – Sharp and crystal-clean, glowing softly
🔸 Netherite Tools – Heavy, ancient, and powerful in design
🧪 Copper Tools – Experimental! A full copper set designed as a visual preview of potential future gear — included as a bonus!
💡 Bonus:

🔄 Optional Copper Variant: A separate version replaces stone tools with copper textures, so you can test how copper gear might feel in normal survival play.
📦 Compatibility:

✔ Works with vanilla Minecraft
✔ No OptiFine or mods required
✔ Perfect for builders, survival players, and creators who want to enhance the visual identity of their tools
